title: Richly Smoked Norwegian Cheese Casserole
description: A charred, cheese-pull, adventurous Norwegian dish featuring oil and coconut cream, perfect for flexitarian foodies. This casserole combines smoked cheese with a creamy coconut crack for a unique flavor experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion until caramelized.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the smoked cheese, coconut cream, salt, black pepper, and cracked black pepper.
Add the cooked onion and garlic to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole for 25 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let the casserole cool for a few minutes before serving.
